video_title: Canada Sends HUGE WARNING & its SPREADING To The Rest of The World

It's how that contraction lines up with a whole bunch of other data from around the rest of the world. We've got France, the UK, Sweden, Mexico, Germany, and a bunch of other places beyond. And then the other part of this is how that weakness is getting to be so substantial even formerly hawkish central bankers have had to change their tune. They need to stay hawkish, maybe even hike further. That was the fear. That was what the market was pricing to, knowing how irrational central bankers can be. That's their bias. But the data is now saying those central bank theories were wrong. France just reported a surprise contraction of first quarter GDP along with more job losses.
